parsed_review.summary: CP00-832 is a Risk-C, descriptor-only Platform Extensibility "fixture permission matrix bridge" pack (150 units, RP27.P05.M04.S06-RP27.P06.M01.S06, upstream CP00-831 / next CP00-833). The pack's claim is correctly scoped: manifest sets production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status=in_progress, implementation_layer=descriptor, production_ready_descriptor_verified=false; it makes no runtime or enterprise-trust claim. Static inspection of the five implementation refs confirms internal consistency: the new descriptor (registry.js:2393) chains from PlatformExtensibilityCp831UiFixtureFoundationBridgeDescriptor; coverage/descriptor/contract validators (validators.js:1302-1429) enforce unit/deliverable/phase/micro/title distributions against the live plan (all match, sum 150) and enforce descriptor_only, runtime_execution=false, no API key/webhook/workflow secrets, no real client data, no permission/audit/product-state writes, Hermes emits_runtime_receipt=false, and Claude read_only=true / not-final-approver. Tests (model.test.js:391-420) assert these with errors===[] and the contract (latest_pack/latest_projection/validation.valid=true, no_write_attestation all-false) and validate script tie it together. Authority boundary and CP178+ review hardening are satisfied (auth preflight passed, non-zero valid-JSON stdout, summary-only disallowed for Risk C, no forbidden tools, no omitted active untracked files, clean first attempt). Two P3 provenance notes only: (1) downstream required closeout artifacts (command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are not yet present — expected mid-closeout ordering; and (2) as a read-only reviewer I verified validation would pass by static inspection but did not execute the npm validation commands. No P0/P1/P2 issues; nothing blocks pack or this-CP goal closeout.

findings.title: Downstream closeout artifacts pending generation
findings.details: required_pack_artifacts lists manifest.json, command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but only manifest.json currently exists in docs/closeout-packs/cp00-832/. pack status is in_progress and pack_level_claude_review.status is pending with empty valid_review_receipts. claude-review-result.json and adjudication.md are downstream of this review, and command-evidence.json/construction-inspection.json record validation and inspection runs. This is the expected closeout ordering (validate -> Claude review -> adjudicate -> inspect -> commit), not an implementation defect, but closeout cannot finalize until they exist.
findings.recommendation: Let the closeout harness generate and validate all four remaining required artifacts before marking CP00-832 closed; require command-evidence.json to show successful exit for every listed validation command.

findings.title: Validation pass verified by static inspection only, not executed
findings.details: As a read-only reviewer without Bash, I confirmed the coverage/descriptor/contract validators, the three CP00-832 tests (model.test.js:391-420), and scripts/validate-rp27-platform-extensibility-contract.mjs are internally consistent and would pass, and that the descriptor/contract/no_write_attestation values satisfy every assertion. I did not observe actual execution of npm test, npm run validate, or the other eight validation commands, and command-evidence.json is absent, so the runtime pass/fail is asserted from source rather than observed.
findings.recommendation: Gate closeout on command-evidence.json capturing a successful run of all ten validation commands plus git diff --check; treat this static review as independent code inspection, not a substitute for executed validation evidence.
